title: Front Office Manager - Menzies Aviation India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Menzies Aviation India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at Menzies Aviation India are looking for an experienced Front Office Manager based out of Surat. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Menzies Aviation India:
Menzies Aviation India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Menzies Aviation India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
